推荐场景: 商店退换货柜台｜说明昨天买的东西
60秒任务: 「买了什么」：过去事件时间线；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 过去时｜事件顺序｜人物地点动作｜结果｜简单原因
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
What did you buy?（询问购买）
I bought ___.（说明物品）
I bought it at the store.（地点）
How much was it?（过去询价）
It was ___ dollars.（价格）
I paid by card.（付款方式）
I paid in cash.（付款方式）
It was cheap but useful.（评价）
I bought one for my friend.（用途）
I didn’t buy anything.（否定）
I needed a new ___.（原因）
The cashier gave me a receipt.（收据）
I lost the receipt.（小问题）
Can I return it?（退货）
I changed my mind.（改变主意）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: store, cashier, receipt, card, cash, bag, phone charger, shirt, gift, price
Verbs: bought, paid, needed, gave, lost, return, changed
Adjectives: cheap, expensive, useful, new, small
Time / Place: yesterday, at the store, for my friend, by card, in cash
Chunks: bought it, paid by card, return it, lost the receipt, changed my mind
